narrator.noNarrations: No narrations found for this narrator.
narrator.narratedFromDesc: People this narrator received hadith from, ranked by frequency

search.tipMultipleWords: Multiple words use AND logic — searching "mercy knowledge" finds content containing both words. If too few results are found, it automatically broadens to match either word.
search.tipArabic: Search in Arabic or English. Arabic diacritics are ignored, so typing without tashkeel works.
search.tipModes: Use "Titles" mode for quick chapter navigation. Switch to "Full Text" to search inside hadith and verse content.
search.tipMinChars: Type at least 2 characters to start searching.
search.tipEnter: Press Enter to see all results on a full page.
search.tipFuzzy: The search engine handles minor typos automatically with fuzzy matching.
search.tryDifferent: Try different keywords or check spelling
search.tipAllWords: Multiple words: results must contain all of them
search.opTopic: topic:sincerity — browse everything on a topic
search.opRef: ref:2:255 — verses citing a Qur'an verse
search.opPhrase: phrase:"in the name of" — exact phrase
search.opTagType: tag:ethics / type:legal_ruling — filter by tag or type
search.refineHint: Showing the top matches — refine your search to narrow it down
search.startHint: Find hadith, verses, summaries and translations — in your language and in the original Arabic.

translation.notAvailable: Translation not available in this language.

pwa.installPrompt: Install Thaqalayn for quick access and offline reading

download.title: Download
download.offlineDescription: Download books to your device for offline access. Downloaded content will be available even without an internet connection.
download.dataPackagesDescription: Download complete datasets as JSON files or export them as CSV for use in your own projects and research.
download.openSourceDesc: All data displayed on the site is open source and you can download it by visiting the data GitHub repository:
download.completeDataDesc: The link above contains the data per page of the site, if instead you would like the all data for one book then that can be found in:
download.generatorDesc: Also note that this data was generated from other raw data and the script used to generate it is in:
download.apiDocs: The API documentation with endpoint reference, data models, and usage examples is available at:
download.communityDesc: If this data is useful to you and you do end up creating a project using it then we would like to hear about it please! You can do this by contacting us through raising an issue on one of the above repositories and feel free to raise a Pull Request for us to link back to your project!
download.growthHope: We hope that we can grow this data over time, hopefully with your help.

about.title: About Thaqalayn
about.intro: Thaqalayn is a free, open digital library of authentic Shia Islamic primary texts — the Holy Quran and the major Shia hadith collections — with Arabic originals, multiple English translations, narrator chains, and scholarly references.
about.contentQuranBody: all 114 surahs, multiple English translations, and classical tafsir.
about.contentHadithBody: over 20 primary sources, including the Four Books (Al-Kafi by al-Kulayni, Tahdhib al-Ahkam and al-Istibsar by al-Tusi, and Man La Yahduruhu al-Faqih by al-Saduq), Nahj al-Balagha, and the Amali compilations. Each includes Arabic text, English translations where available, hadith grading, and full narrator chains (isnad).
about.contentNarratorsBody: over 4,600 canonical narrator profiles linked to every hadith they appear in, with biographical context where available.
about.contentAiBody: diacritised Arabic, key-term glosses, cross-references, summaries, and topic tags, clearly labelled as AI-generated and toggleable.
about.objective1: Make the hadith of Ahl al-Bayt more accessible online.
about.objective2: Serve as an open data source: hadith datasets are open source and freely downloadable for others to build on.
about.objective3: Serve as a stable reference: every hadith and verse has a unique, shareable URL.
about.objective4: Act as an aggregation point for relevant scholarly data as it becomes available.
about.principleOpenBody: Every page corresponds to a JSON file you can download and reuse. The full corpus is published as a static API at thaqalayndata.netlify.app.
about.principleReproducibleBody: All data is generated from scripted parsers. There are no hand-edits to source files — everything can be rebuilt from scratch.
about.principleFreeBody: No accounts, no paywalls, no advertising.
about.thanksIntro: This project stands on the work of others. Special thanks to:
about.thanksTanzil: for the canonical Quran text under CC BY 3.0, and for showing what an open scholarly resource can look like.
about.thanksNetlify: for free hosting that made this project possible.

support.title: Getting Support
support.intro: This project is being run as an open source project on GitHub so support will also be through there.
support.siteIssue: An issue regarding how the site looks
support.createNewIssue: and if your issue is not currently addressed please create a new issue.
support.dataIssue: An issue to do with the data on the site
support.troubleshootingDesc: If the site is showing outdated content, broken text, or displaying raw key names instead of proper text, refreshing the app data usually fixes it by re-downloading content and translations from the server — without touching your bookmarks or notes. Only use the full reset if refreshing doesn't help.
support.refreshDataDesc: Re-downloads content, translations, and app files from the server. Keeps your bookmarks, notes, and settings.
support.refreshConfirmDesc: This clears cached content so the latest version is re-downloaded. Your personal data is kept:
support.refreshKept2: Reading progress, badges, and plans — kept
support.refreshKept3: Language, theme, and display settings — kept
support.refreshCleared: Cached books, translations, and app files will be re-downloaded.
support.refreshSuccess: App data refreshed. Click the button below to reload with the latest content.
support.resetSiteDataDesc: Erases everything, including your bookmarks and notes. Use only if refreshing doesn't help.
support.resetConfirmDesc: This will clear all locally stored data and force the site to re-download everything from the server. The following will be permanently deleted:
support.resetItem1: Cached pages and offline data (service worker cache)
support.resetItem4: Your language, theme, and AI display preferences
support.resetSuccess: Site data has been cleared successfully. Click the button below to reload with fresh data.

quranBronze.desc: Read at least a quarter of the Quran.

breadthFive.label: Five windows
